description_long: This doll depicts a humanoid animatronic figure with a heavily damaged and decayed exterior, exposing internal endoskeleton and wiring throughout its body. The head is large and skull-like, with a wide, toothy grin and hollow eye sockets, and a prominent, broken ear or antenna protruding from the top. The limbs and torso are riddled with tears, holes, and exposed metal, giving a sense of severe wear and neglect. The hands and feet are clawed, with some fingers and toes missing or broken, and the surface is mottled with dark, grimy patches and hints of rust. Wires and mechanical parts dangle from various points, especially at the joints and extremities, enhancing the unsettling, horror-themed appearance. The overall color palette is dominated by dark, muted greens, browns, and reds, contributing to a decrepit, abandoned look.
description: A damaged, horror-themed animatronic doll with exposed endoskeleton, torn outer shell, and dangling wires, featuring a skull-like head and clawed limbs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's skull-like face, wide grin, hollow eyes, and prominent broken ear or antenna, with extensive damage and exposed wiring on the torso and limbs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the protruding jaw, broken ear, and the depth of the torso and limb damage, with visible wires and mechanical parts.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, exposed endoskeleton, and more torn areas on the back and legs, with wires hanging from the joints.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the profile of the face, jaw, and broken ear, as well as the extent of the damage and exposed components along the side.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll's exterior consists of a torn, animatronic shell with exposed endoskeleton and wiring, featuring a horror or decayed animatronic theme.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent at the elbows and hanging at the sides, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Permanent wide, toothy grin with hollow, gaping eye sockets and no visible eyebrows, giving a fixed, unsettling expression.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is bald and mechanical with a broken ear or antenna protruding from the top.
